title: Section 52
content: 1[52. Limitation of time for prosecution.--No person shall be liable to punishment for any offence against this Act or any rule or regulation made thereunder or any bye-law continued thereunder, unless complaint of such offence is made before a Magistrate within six months next after,-- (a) the date of the commission of such offence, or (b) the date on which the commission or existence of such offence was first brought to the notice of the complainant.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 71 of 1971, s. 7(a) and the Schedule (w.e.f. 3-9-1971).
